summary: Iteration 60 - Homepage Redesign & Text-Only Posts Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests PASSED. All 21 frontend features verified working. Major changes tested: compact hero with 3 pill buttons, info modal popup, horizontal products row, social feed as main content, inline post creator with '¿Que estas pensando?' placeholder, text-only posts (Twitter-style), like animation, bookmark button, comment inline, role badges.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/posts with text only (no image) - PASS (creates post with image_url=null)
Backend: POST /api/posts with both text and image - PASS (creates post with image_url)
Backend: POST /api/posts fails when neither text nor image provided - PASS (400 error)
Backend: POST /api/posts fails with whitespace-only caption - PASS (400 error)
Backend: GET /api/feed returns text-only posts correctly (image_url is null) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like toggles like - PASS
Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments adds comment - PASS
Backend: Producer can create text-only posts - PASS
Backend: GET /api/influencer/dashboard - PASS (regression)
Frontend: Homepage shows compact hero with 'Hispaloshop' title - PASS
Frontend: Hero has 3 pill buttons (¿Que es Hispaloshop?, Explorar productos, Unete a la comunidad) - PASS
Frontend: '¿Que es Hispaloshop?' button opens info modal - PASS
Frontend: Info modal shows 4 feature sections (Calidad certificada, Asistente IA integrado, Envios a toda Europa, Comunidad activa) - PASS
Frontend: Info modal has close button (X) that works - PASS
Frontend: Products row shows horizontal scroll with product thumbnails - PASS
Frontend: Social feed is the main content area on homepage - PASS
Frontend: Inline post creator shows '¿Que estas pensando?' placeholder - PASS
Frontend: Text-only posts display correctly (no image area shown, larger font) - PASS
Frontend: Image posts display correctly with image - PASS
Frontend: Like button with animation works (heart fills red) - PASS
Frontend: Comment inline works (expands, input visible, submits) - PASS
Frontend: Bookmark/save button toggles (fills green when saved) - PASS
Frontend: Share button visible on posts - PASS
Frontend: Role badges (Vendedor) shown on posts - PASS
Frontend: Producer can create posts from homepage feed - PASS
Frontend: Influencer dashboard still loads correctly - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js well-structured with compact hero, info modal, products row, and social feed sections
InfoModal component properly displays 4 feature sections with icons (Shield, Sparkles, Globe, Users)
SocialFeed.js CreatePostInline component correctly handles text-only posts with '¿Que estas pensando?' placeholder
PostCard correctly handles text-only posts (isTextOnly = !post.image_url) with larger font
Backend POST /api/posts correctly validates: requires text OR image, fails with empty/whitespace-only caption
Bookmark is client-side only (not persisted to backend) - as documented
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
seed_data_creation: Test posts created during testing: text-only posts and image posts with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 tested the major homepage redesign. HomePage.js now has: 1) Compact hero with 3 pill buttons, 2) Info modal popup (data-testid='info-modal') with 4 feature sections, 3) Horizontal products row, 4) Social feed as main content. SocialFeed.js has: 1) CreatePostInline component (data-testid='create-post-inline') with '¿Que estas pensando?' placeholder, 2) Support for text-only posts (image_url is null), 3) Bookmark button (client-side only), 4) Like animation on double-tap for images. Backend POST /api/posts uses File(None) for optional image. Role badges working (Vendedor, Influencer, Admin).

homepage_redesign.compact_hero: Working - Hispaloshop title, subtitle, 3 pill buttons
homepage_redesign.info_modal: Working - Opens on click, 4 sections, close button
homepage_redesign.social_feed_main: Working - Feed is the main content area

social_feed_enhancements.inline_post_creator: Working - Shows for logged-in users with placeholder
social_feed_enhancements.text_only_posts: Working - No image area, larger font
social_feed_enhancements.like_animation: Working - Heart fills red with animation

mocked_api_notes: Bookmark/save is client-side only (no backend persistence yet) - as documented
